children.name: Attendu HTTP 400 ou 500, recu 200 -- {"bookingid":3758,"booking":{"firstname":"Jim","lastname":"Brown","totalprice":-100,"depositpaid":true,"bookingdates":{"checkin":"2025-01-01","checkout":"2025-01-10"},"additionalneeds":"Breakfast"}} expected [true] but found [false]
